title: canarium planifolium
intro: Canarium planifolium, also known as the Pili nut tree, is a tropical evergreen tree native to the Philippines and other parts of Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its edible nuts, which are rich in medicinal properties, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The medicinal properties of Canarium planifolium are said to help alleviate various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, providing several health benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved immune function. The plant is commonly prepared as a herbal tea or oil, and its nuts are often roasted or ground into a flour for consumption.
